cau_hoi: She is walking on the ................ . She doesn't know how to say.
giai_thich: walk on air: cảm thấy cực kỳ hạnh phúc, bay bổng.

cau_hoi: When you do something, you should ................ .
C: weigh up the pros and cons
giai_thich: weigh up the pros and cons: cân nhắc ưu và nhược điểm (lợi và hại).

cau_hoi: Someone who is inexperienced is ................ .
giai_thich: green: còn non nớt, thiếu kinh nghiệm.

cau_hoi: The year-end party was out of this world. We had never tasted such delicious food.
giai_thich: out of this world: tuyệt vời, xuất sắc (vượt ngoài mong đợi).

cau_hoi: The nominating committee always meet behind closed doors lest its deliberations become known prematurely.
giai_thich: behind closed doors: kín, không công khai, riêng tư.

cau_hoi: She's so ................; you really have to watch you say or she'll walk out of the room.
giai_thich: prim and proper: kỹ lưỡng (quá mức), bảo thủ, dễ bị sốc bởi điều khiếm nhã.

cau_hoi: Like everyone else, Sue has her ................ of course but on the whole, she's quite satisfied with life.
giai_thich: ups and downs: những lúc thăng trầm của cuộc đời.

cau_hoi: Peter is working in an office. He's a white-................ worker.
giai_thich: white-collar worker: công chức, lao động trí óc (ngược với blue-collar).

cau_hoi: When confronted with a mass of ................ tape many people feel a sense of powerlessness.
giai_thich: red tape: nạn quan liêu, thủ tục rườm rà.

cau_hoi: Although they are important, these visible expressions of culture, which are taught deliberately and learned consciously, are only the ................ of the iceberg of culture.
giai_thich: the tip of the iceberg: phần nổi của tảng băng chìm (chỉ là một phần nhỏ thấy được).

cau_hoi: I'm ................ my brother is.
giai_thich: nowhere near: còn lâu mới bằng, chắc chắn là không bằng.

cau_hoi: I felt a bit ................ and seemed to have more aches and pains than usual.
giai_thich: out of sorts: cảm thấy mệt, khó chịu trong người.

cau_hoi: Man: "I heard you have a part in the school play tonight." Woman: "Yes, and I'm on ................ and needles."
giai_thich: on pins and needles: lo lắng, bồn chồn.

cau_hoi: I'm really feeling under the ................ today; I have a terrible cold.
giai_thich: under the weather: cảm thấy không khỏe, bị ốm.

cau_hoi: George has ................; he loves cakes, chocolate, ice-cream-anything which is sweet.
giai_thich: a sweet tooth: người thích ăn đồ ngọt.

cau_hoi: The political candidate knew the issue was a hot ................ so he deferred to his chief of staff who directed questions to the committee chairperson.
giai_thich: a hot potato: vấn đề nan giải, vấn đề nóng hổi gây tranh cãi.

cau_hoi: Making mistakes is all ................ of growing up.
giai_thich: part and parcel: phần thiết yếu, phần không thể tách rời.

cau_hoi: Don't let my mother watch any of those sad movies. She cries at the drop of a ................ .
giai_thich: at the drop of a hat: ngay lập tức, không cần do dự.

cau_hoi: Denise has been burning the midnight ................ trying to finish this report so she must be exhausted.
giai_thich: burn the midnight oil: thức khuya làm việc, học bài.

cau_hoi: You can't believe a word that woman says – she is a ................ liar.
giai_thich: a compulsive liar: kẻ nói dối chuyên nghiệp, thói quen khó bỏ.

cau_hoi: I was excited to start taking night classes after work, but now, without enough time to devote either to school or to my job, I feel like I'm falling between ................ stools.
giai_thich: fall between two stools: tiến thoái lưỡng nan, hỏng cả hai việc.

cau_hoi: You'd better ................ the books if you want to pass your exam on Friday.
giai_thich: hit the books: bắt đầu học bài, dùi mài kinh sử.

cau_hoi: I heard ................ that Jack has been dropped from the basketball team.
giai_thich: on the grapevine: nghe đồn, nghe phong phanh.

cau_hoi: At school, people always used to take the ................ out of him for having red hair.
giai_thich: take the mickey out of sb: chế nhạo, châm chọc ai đó.

cau_hoi: When you use the Internet you have so much information at your ................ .
giai_thich: at one's fingertips: có sẵn thông tin/kiến thức và sử dụng nhanh chóng.

cau_hoi: They ................ their car at our disposal for our entire stay.
giai_thich: put st at one's disposal: cho ai tùy ý sử dụng cái gì.

cau_hoi: Today we ................ electricity for granted and perhaps we do not realize just how useful this discovery has been.
giai_thich: take st for granted: coi cái gì là hiển nhiên (nên không trân trọng).

cau_hoi: This food is ................ the house, you don't have to pay for it.
giai_thich: on the house: miễn phí (do nhà hàng chiêu đãi).

cau_hoi: She went to college to study history but changed ................ and is now a doctor.
giai_thich: change horses in midstream: thay đổi giữa chừng (đặc biệt là kế hoạch/quyết định).

cau_hoi: When I hear stories of cruelty to animals, it makes my ................ boil.
giai_thich: make one's blood boil: làm cho ai đó sôi máu, cực kỳ giận dữ.

cau_hoi: She is a rising star as a standup comedian, always able to bring down the ................ during each performance.
giai_thich: bring down the house: làm cho cả khán phòng vỗ tay nhiệt liệt.
